◎简　　介  

　　Griselda’s debut film is called Conflicted, and it’ll be available on January 15th. It stars Benny The Butcher as Hunter, “a Buffalo gangster who struggles to do right after being releases from prison.” It was directed by AK Reed and written by Duece King, who also acts in the film.
